waitForText.value: A business like yours, in the Health industry, has an average per record cost of $429.00* if a data breach happens. With 5,000 clients, that means a potential breach of your business could cost up to $2,145,000.00.

verifyText.value: In addition to the monetary costs of a data breach, you could stand to lose a portion of your customers due to reputational risk.
The industry you selected has an average fraud-related client churn rate† of 7.00%*.
The potential number of clients lost to the reputational damage of a data breach is 350.
National Average Communication Consumer Education Energy Entertainment Financial Health Hospitality Industrial Media Pharmaceuticals Public Research Retail Services Technology Transportation

A business like yours, in the Hospitality industry, has an average per record cost of $123.00* if a data breach happens. With 7,500 clients, that means a potential breach of your business could cost up to $922,500.00.
In addition to the monetary costs of a data breach, you could stand to lose a portion of your customers due to reputational risk.
The industry you selected has an average fraud-related client churn rate† of 2.50%*.
The potential number of clients lost to the reputational damage of a data breach is 188.
*Record data as of 2019. Provided by IBM; for more information visit https://www.ibm.com/security/data-breach
†Churn rate defined as: loss of customers, expressed as an annual percentage of a company's total customer base, due to incidents of fraud.
